summary: Clean digital PDFs and text archives to AI-ready JSONL with extracted text, chunks, embeddings, stable IDs, and a run report.
broader_system: Controlled distributed execution for async AI workloads with central scheduling, bounded tasks, retries, visible outcomes, and completed work rather than raw GPU rental.
best_for: public or semi-public connector introductions tied to real document-heavy AI workloads
not_for: custom structured extraction in the current trial
highly sensitive data without prior agreement

starting_price.qualification: standard clean digital PDF/text batch processing

security_boundary: Low- or moderate-sensitivity pilot workloads. Sensitive or regulated data requires prior agreement.
